fields.label: Personal Access Token
fields.helpText: From Asana -> My Settings -> Apps -> Manage Developer Apps -> Personal Access Tokens

healthcheck_config.description: Validates personal access token via Asana users/me endpoint

metadata.summary: Asana project management for tasks, projects, and team collaboration.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Open Asana and click your profile photo (top right)
2. Go to My Settings -> Apps -> Manage Developer Apps
3. Under Personal Access Tokens, click 'Create new token'
4. Give it a description and click 'Create token'
5. Copy the token (format: 1/12345:abcdef...) and paste it here
